title: Resource APIs, Pagination, Idempotency, and Concurrency Control · Go Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A production-readiness review compares near-miss decisions for resource apis, pagination, idempotency, and concurrency control and requires the smallest safe stable resource and mutation consistency contract with changed-request evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for stable resource and mutation consistency contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define stable transport schemas, domain models, persistence records, optional and null semantics, field ownership, and evolution boundaries separately.
Build opaque cursor pagination from a unique stable order, bound page size, preserve filters and authorization, and test inserts and deletes between pages.
Scope and validate idempotency keys, bind request fingerprints, serialize first execution, persist terminal outcome, expire records, and reject mismatched replay.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Resource Schema Boundary · changed case · Quiz Resource Schema Boundary
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz team handles case 8608 in a privacy-sensitive records API using conditional requests. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate optimistic version conflicts from valid idempotency replay; then remove one trusted intermediary and recompute authority without forwarded fields. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define stable transport schemas, domain models, persistence records, optional and null semantics, field ownership, and evolution boundaries separately.
